examinstructions:
1. Don't leave the exam screen during exam session.
2. Pay close attention to the timer. The exam will be automatically submitted when the remaining time is zero.
3. Make sure you answered all questions.
4. Your exam records are saved automatically. If the exam is interrupted, be sure to re-enter into the exam as soon as possible (before it ends).
5. If multiple attempts allowed, the highest score will be counted.

itemanalysisexp: Instructions: 1. Difficulty: It is calculated by the question answer's accuracy rate and the value is between 0 and 1. The larger the value, the easier the question, vice versa. In general, the difficulty value between 0.3 and 0.8 is appropriate. 2. Differentiation: It is the degree of how the question can differentiate the students' academic levels. The value is between -1 and 1. The larger the value, the better the differentiation. In general, the value should be at least 0.3.
